title: pedicularis sylvatica var. lusitanica
intro: Pedicularis sylvatica var. lusitanica, also known as Lusitanian lousewort, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The health benefits of Pedicularis sylvatica var. lusitanica include its potential to treat coughs and colds, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in the treatment of urinary issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be made by combining the leaves and flowers with water or a solvent, and are often used to treat respiratory and urinary issues.
